about.label: Our Story
about.heading: Two Decades of Frequency-Based Wellness
about.intro: Founded in 2009 as Integrative Medicine Lda, CellPowerX Wellness Center is Lisbon's pioneering space dedicated to bioelectrical and frequency-based approaches to well-being. What began as a research-driven clinic has grown into a reference point for integrative wellness in Europe.
about.founderBio: With a background spanning Mathematics, Systems Engineering, and Biochemistry, Nuno Nina has spent over two decades investigating the intersection of frequencies, bioelectrical systems, and human well-being. His research led to the development of the Gold Frequencies protocol and contributed to electrotherapy systems and the Healy system - technologies now used by practitioners worldwide. More recently, his work has focused on water as a medium for bioelectrical coherence, resulting in CellPower Water®. The Wellness Center in Lisbon remains the epicenter of his ongoing research.
about.approachBody: We work at the informational and bioelectrical level - supporting the body's natural capacity for balance and coherence. Our protocols address the underlying bioelectrical environment, creating conditions for the body to self-regulate and restore. Every session is guided by data, refined by experience, and tailored to you.
about.ecosystemBody: Our Wellness Center is more than a clinic - it is the living laboratory where the CellPowerX philosophy comes to life. The protocols developed here inform everything CellPowerX creates, from the ACTYVA device to our supplement lines. When you visit, you experience the source.

ourScience.label: The Science Behind Our Approach
ourScience.heading: Understanding Cellular Bioelectrics
ourScience.intro: At CellPowerX Wellness Center, our services are grounded in the study of bioelectrical activity - a field of biophysics that explores how electrical signals influence cellular organisation, communication and overall well-being.
ourScience.teslaQuote: If you want to find the secrets of the Universe, think in terms of energy, frequency and vibration.
ourScience.cellsBody: The body comprises trillions of cells organized into tissues, organs, and systems. From a biophysical perspective, organisms function as complex electrical systems where atoms, ions, and charged particles facilitate cellular communication and organization.
ourScience.cellsBody2: Atoms consist of subatomic particles. When atoms gain or lose electrons, they become ions with electrical charges, enabling interaction with other ions to form structured biological environments.
ourScience.ionsBody: Ions carry electrical charge. Their distribution across cell membranes creates electrical potential differences between cell interior and exterior. This membrane potential is fundamental to cellular signaling, transport mechanisms, and functional coordination.
ourScience.ionsBody2: Membrane potential remains dynamic rather than static, continuously adapting to metabolic activity, energetic demand, and environmental conditions.
ourScience.disclaimerNote: This content is provided for educational and informational purposes only. It does not constitute medical advice, diagnosis or treatment.
ourScience.membraneBody: Membrane potential serves as a reference parameter in biophysical research for understanding cellular adaptation and response to internal and external influences. Electrical potential variations correlate with shifts in cellular behavior, efficiency, and communication.
ourScience.internalBody: The extracellular environment - including electrolytes, minerals, and nutrients - contributes to bioelectrical balance stability. When coherent and well-supported, cells better sustain natural activity cycles, recovery, and organization.
ourScience.internalBody2: Wellness contexts emphasize supporting conditions that favor balance, coherence, and functional optimization without disease diagnosis or treatment.
ourScience.activityBody: Well-functioning cells associate with stable, well-regulated membrane potential supporting efficient cellular activity and metabolic coordination. This electrical balance links closely to mitochondrial function, energy availability, and intracellular process organization.
ourScience.activityBody2: Membrane potential varies naturally as cells adapt to metabolic demand, age, environmental conditions, and external influences. Research contexts observe these variations as indicators of cellular efficiency changes, stress response, and adaptive capacity.
ourScience.keyStatement: All diseases will relate to a value for cell membrane lost electrical potential.
ourScience.keyStatementBody: Variations in cell membrane potential indicate changes in cellular bioelectrical organization. Within wellness contexts, practitioners support conditions favoring bioelectrical balance, cellular coherence, and functional optimization.
ourScience.cyclesBody: Cellular activity involves natural electrical variation cycles, including depolarization and repolarization phases. These fluctuations reflect cellular adaptation to metabolic demand, energetic activity, and internal organization.
ourScience.cyclesBody2: Under balanced conditions, cells regulate electrical cycles efficiently, maintaining coherence between intracellular and extracellular environments. This dynamic equilibrium supports functional coordination and adaptive capacity.
ourScience.cyclesBody3: When extracellular environment coherence decreases - regarding electrolyte availability, mineral balance, and nutrient presence - cells may show altered electrical regulation. Research contexts study such variations as bioelectrical organization and adaptive efficiency indicators rather than diagnostic markers.
ourScience.phBody: Biophysical models study extracellular environment variations - including pH and electrolyte distribution - as factors influencing cellular organization and bioelectrical balance.
ourScience.phBody2: Environments shifting toward higher acidity associate, in research contexts, with ionic availability changes and electrical coherence alterations around cells. These variations affect how cells regulate exchange, signaling, and adaptive processes.
ourScience.phBody3: Educational and wellness frameworks emphasize understanding how hydration, mineral balance, and lifestyle factors contribute to maintaining stable, coherent extracellular environments without diagnosing or treating medical conditions.
ourScience.ctaBody: Our services apply these principles through non-invasive technologies designed to support your body's natural bioelectrical balance.

treatments.heading: Our Services
treatments.intro: Four distinct modalities, one integrated approach. Each service can be experienced individually or combined into a personalized protocol designed for your specific needs.

timewaver.name: Electrotherapy
timewaver.tagline: Frequency-based support for balance, coherence and well-being
timewaver.howItWorks: Electrotherapy uses precise frequencies and low-intensity electrical signals within an informational framework designed to support cellular organisation and bioelectrical balance. It operates at the informational and bioelectrical level, focusing on supporting coherence within intra- and extracellular environments.
applications: Physical comfort and functional balance (muscular tension, joint discomfort, general fatigue)
Mental and emotional well-being (stress management, relaxation, focus)
Long-term balance and preventive wellness support

nanopulse.name: NanoPulse
nanopulse.tagline: Pulsed magnetic fields for relaxation and energetic balance
nanopulse.howItWorks: A non-invasive system that generates low-frequency pulsed magnetic fields, interacting with the body at an energetic and bioelectrical level. Sessions last 3 to 20 minutes, with intensity managed by the therapist based on your feedback.
applications: Relaxation, energetic balance, and a general sense of comfort and vitality

infrared.name: Infrared Therapy
infrared.tagline: Gentle warmth for physical comfort and a sense of lightness
infrared.howItWorks: Infrared radiation produces a gentle warming effect at the surface of the body. Our infrared environment uses controlled IR energy to create a comfortable thermal experience, promoting relaxation and physical comfort. Non-invasive, no direct contact, and generally well tolerated.
applications: Relaxation, physical comfort, enhanced sense of lightness and overall well-being

slmwave.name: SLM Wave
slmwave.tagline: Non-invasive light frequencies for body harmonization
slmwave.howItWorks: SLM Wave uses specific 532nm light frequencies to provide energetic stimulation, supporting natural body harmonization and enhancing the aesthetic appearance of the silhouette. A premium, painless experience.
applications: Body harmonization, silhouette refinement, aesthetic well-being

treatments.firstAppointmentBody: Your first visit (approximately 1h30) includes a bioelectrical scan performed at the center to identify your body's electrical levels and areas of focus, followed by an initial electrotherapy session. From there, we design your personalized protocol.
treatments.globalDisclaimer: All services described are wellness-oriented and do not constitute medical advice, diagnosis, or medical intervention. The technologies used are wellness devices designed to support balance and well-being within an informational and bioelectrical framework.

faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: What happens in the first appointment?
faq.a1: Your first visit (approximately 1h30) includes a bioelectrical scan performed at the center to identify your body's electrical levels and areas of focus, followed by an initial electrotherapy session. This data informs your ongoing protocol.
faq.q2: How long is a typical session?
faq.a2: Sessions vary by modality: Electrotherapy sessions typically last 45–60 minutes, NanoPulse 3–20 minutes, and Infrared and SLM Wave sessions are tailored to your needs.
faq.a3: All our services are non-invasive and generally well tolerated. Specific contraindications exist for certain modalities - your practitioner will review these with you during your first visit.
faq.a4: Yes. Many clients benefit from a combined protocol that integrates multiple modalities. Your practitioner will design the optimal combination based on your bioelectrical analysis.
faq.a5: We offer personalized wellness plans. Please contact us to discuss options tailored to your needs and goals.

footer.newsletterBody: Wellness insights, research updates, and exclusive invitations.
